message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #888888
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #EDEDED
  ActorBorderColor #888888
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #888888
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ReferenceBorderColor #000000
  ReferenceBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

actor "Specialist Doctor" as SD
participant ":CreateReportUI" as UI
participant ":CreateReportController" as C
participant ":Company" as Company
participant ":TestDiagnosis" as TD
participant "rp : TestReportStore" as Store
participant "rp : TestReport" as Report
participant "obj : diagnosis" as Diagnosis

SD -> UI : 1 asks to create a new diagnosis

ref over UI, C : US4_SD_testsDTO.puml

UI --> SD : 2 requests to choose a given test
SD -> UI : 3 chooses a given test

UI -> C : 4 createTestDiagnosis(idTest)
C -> TD : 5 createTestDiagnosis(test)
TD -> Diagnosis : 6 createTestDiagnosis(testParameterList)
TD --> C : 7 getDiagnosis()
C --> UI : 8 getDiagnosis()

UI --> SD : 9 shows the diagnosis done automatically and requests the data for the report
SD -> UI : 10 types the requested data

UI -> C : 11 createReport(idTest, diagnosis, report)
C -> Company : 12 store = getTestReportStore()
C -> Store : 13 createReport(idTest, diagnosis, report)
Store -> Report : 14 create(idTest, diagnosis, report)
C -> Store : 15 validateReport()

UI --> SD : 16 shows the typed data and asks for confirmation
SD -> UI : 17 confirms the data

UI -> C : 18 saveReport(report)
C -> Company : 19 saveReport(report)
Company -> Store : 20 saveReport(report)
Store -> Store : 21 validateReport(report)
Store -> Store : 22 addReport(report)

UI --> SD : 23 informs operation success
@enduml
